title: Notifications -  Low Battery OFF
scenario: Low Battery notification does not appear after power cycling when disabled in Poly Lens Menu > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the paired mobile device.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left corner.
6. Locate the 'Low Battery' notification toggle and turn it OFF.
7. Ensure the paired Poly Bluetooth audio device has a battery level below 5%.
8. Power cycle the paired device (turn it OFF, then ON again).
9. Observe the mobile device for any notification.
expected: The 'Device has a low battery' notification does NOT appear on the mobile device after power cycling.
